raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Recognizing contributions","name":"What aspect of the payments refactor are you most proud of, and how do you think it impacted the team?","description":"Encourages them to reflect on their personal contributions and the effect on team dynamics.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Current mood check","name":"Do you feel like you're in a good place with your projects, or is there something weighing on you?","description":"Aims to understand their current emotional state and any underlying issues affecting wellbeing.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":-1}]},{"label":"Mentoring aspirations","name":"You've mentioned wanting to do more mentoring — what specific areas do you feel passionate about sharing with others?","description":"Explores their mentoring interests to clarify role alignment and growth opportunities.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Upcoming billing rewrite","name":"What are your initial thoughts on the upcoming billing rewrite? Are there specific challenges or contributions you foresee?","description":"Gathers their insights on upcoming responsibilities and expectations for the billing rewrite.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Blocker check-in","name":"What are the biggest obstacles you're currently facing on your projects, if any?","description":"Encourages a deeper discussion on challenges that could impact their work satisfaction and output.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":-1}]},{"label":"Energy levels","name":"How do you feel about your energy levels as we move toward the billing rewrite? Any concerns or adjustments needed?","description":"Seeks to assess their energy and motivation levels in light of upcoming changes.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":-1}]},{"label":"Reflecting on feedback","name":"What feedback from your peers or team members has resonated with you lately, and how are you planning to apply it?","description":"Looks for engagement with feedback and their approach to personal growth.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Celebrating wins","name":"How do you think we can celebrate the team's success with the payments refactor moving forward?","description":"Explores ideas for recognition and team morale, fostering a sense of ownership and engagement.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]}]}
